result:
**Operational Summary (2026-07-19)**

15 services (user-profile-service, payment-gateway, billing-worker, auth-service, ingest-api, search-indexer, export-pipeline, metrics-collector, report-builder, session-manager, cache-warmer, audit-logger, notification-daemon, webhook-relay, scheduler-core) completed ~40+ operations across production, staging, canary, QA, blue/green, and dev environments.

Operations included: health checks, scaling, draining, rolling back, patching, migrations, downgrading, redeploying, restarting, reconfiguring, upgrading. Timestamps: ~09:15, 11:05, 14:40, 16:20, plus morning/evening shifts.

Outcomes: Alerts cleared, errors stabilized, metrics/CPU normalized, queue depths drained, smoke tests passed. Some operations required manual retries (export-pipeline QA, scheduler-core blue, ingest-api staging, notification-daemon blue). No pager alerts or customer impact observed.

Status: Follow-up configuration tasks pending; postmortems/runbooks updated.
